_comment: Fill in every field with your real information. Remove this _comment key before use.
name: Your Full Name
summary: Results-driven Data Engineer with X years of experience designing and delivering large-scale data pipelines, analytics platforms, and cloud-based data infrastructure. Passionate about enabling data-driven decisions through robust ETL/ELT frameworks, real-time streaming, and modern data stack tooling.
skills: AWS (S3, Glue, Redshift, EMR, Athena, Lambda)

experience._comment: Most recent role first. Use end_year=0 for current role.
experience.title: Senior Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and maintained 20+ production Airflow DAGs processing 5 TB/day across AWS S3 and Redshift.
Built Spark-based ETL pipelines on EMR, reducing data processing time by 40%.
Led migration of legacy SQL Server jobs to dbt + Snowflake, cutting query latency by 60%.
Implemented Delta Lake on Databricks for ACID-compliant lakehouse architecture.
Mentored 3 junior engineers; drove team adoption of CI/CD via GitHub Actions and Terraform.

experience.title: Data Engineer
bullets: Built real-time Kafka → Spark Streaming → PostgreSQL pipeline handling 100K events/minute.
Automated data ingestion from 15 third-party REST APIs using Python + Apache Airflow.
Developed Redshift data warehouse schemas supporting 50+ business KPI dashboards in Tableau.
Containerized data services with Docker and deployed on AWS ECS.

experience.title: Junior Data Engineer / Analytics Engineer
bullets: Wrote Python scripts to extract, transform, and load data from MySQL and flat files into a central data warehouse.
Created Tableau dashboards consumed by 200+ business stakeholders daily.
Optimised slow-running SQL queries, reducing report generation time from 45 min to 3 min.
Assisted DBA team with MySQL replication setup and performance tuning.

certifications: Databricks Certified Associate Developer for Apache Spark
